hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '\.env(\.local|\.production)?[[:space:]]*$|\.env(\.local|\.production)?[[:space:]]'; then if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git add|^git commit'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Blocked: attempting to add .env file to git. Secrets must never be committed."}}'; exit 0; fi; fi; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'supabase/migrations/.*\.sql$' && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Blocked: editing an existing migration file. Create a NEW migration instead — applied migrations must never be modified."}}'; exit 0; fi; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|css|md)$'; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; exit 0
INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then npx eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; exit 0

BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'no-git'); STATUS=$(git status --short 2>/dev/null | head -5 | sed 's/"/\\"/g' | tr '\n' '|' || echo ''); echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"SessionStart\",\"additionalContext\":\"Current git branch: $BRANCH. Recent uncommitted changes: $STATUS\"}}"; exit 0
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your attention" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Glass"' 2>/dev/null || true
